scenario: A company uses Microsoft Dataverse. You need to integrate with Azure services when events in Dataverse are triggered. You need to determine the appropriate option for listening to Dataverse events.
q: Drag the appropriate option to each scenario. An option may be used once, more than once, or not at all.
rows: To load balance events with an external system.
To connect securely with on-premises systems.
why: Use an AZURE FUNCTION (via a webhook) to process event data synchronously - webhooks/functions support synchronous, real-time processing. Use AZURE SERVICE BUS to queue and load-balance events to an external system reliably (messages are buffered and distributed). Use AZURE RELAY to securely connect Dataverse to systems running on-premises behind a firewall without opening inbound ports. Azure Service Bus is asynchronous (queue-based), so it is not used for synchronous processing.
